## Proposal Title
A clear title for the governance proposal.

## Summary
Brief summary of the proposed change.

## Current State
Describe the current governance rules or processes.

## Proposed Change
Describe the proposed changes in detail.

## Rationale
Why is this change needed?

## Affected Components
What does this proposal affect?
- [ ] SNP thresholds
- [ ] Kill switch conditions
- [ ] Governance board composition
- [ ] Veto weights
- [ ] Mutation limits
- [ ] Other: ___

## Risk Assessment
What risks does this change introduce?

## Mitigation
How should these risks be mitigated?

## Required Votes
- [ ] Minor decision (3/5 quorum)
- [ ] Major decision (4/5 quorum)

## Signatures Required
List required governance board signatures.

## Timeline
Proposed implementation timeline.
